title: To Our Sweethearts
content:
To our Sweethearts and Wives,
    The joy of our lives!
    May our Wives be our Sweethearts--
    Our Sweethearts, our Wives.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Herford delivers a powerful performance in "To Our Sweethearts"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
